arabic: حَدَّثَنَا فَرْوَةُ، عَنْ عَلِيٍّ، عَنْ هِشَامٍ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، قَالَ كَانَ سَيْفُ الزُّبَيْرِ مُحَلًّى بِفِضَّةٍ‏.‏ قَالَ هِشَامٌ وَكَانَ سَيْفُ عُرْوَةَ مُحَلًّى بِفِضَّةٍ‏.‏

english.text:
That his father said, "The sword of Az-Zubair was decorated with silver." Hisham added, "The sword 
of `Urwa was (also) decorated with silver. "

chapter.english: Military Expeditions led by the Prophet (pbuh) (Al-Maghaazi)
